SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE ASSIGNED TO DEPARTMENT 01

CAUSE CALLED FOR SETTLEMENT CONF. PL. PRESENT W/JACQUELINE WOODS AS COUNSEL. DEF. DION MOSES PRESENT & IN PRO PER. SETTLED BY STIP. FOR ENTRY OF JUDGMENT & TO INCLUDE DEF. EDITH MOSES ON WHOM DEFAULT WAS FILED 5-5-94. PL. TO HAVE RESTITUTION OF PREMISES AT 1170 MCALLISTER,#414, S.F, CA. - STAYED UNDER CONDITION DEF. PAY $1,385 RENT & DAMAGES, $80 COSTS, $250 ATTY FEES & $40 LATE CHGS - DEFS. MAY REMAIN IN POSSESSION IF THEY PAY $1,385 BY 5PM, 5-18-94, THEIR MONTHLY RENT BY THE 5TH OF EACH MO. & STARTIN JUNE THEIR RENT PLUS $75 UNTIL THE BALANCE OF $370 IS PD. IN FULL - DEFS. AGREE NOT TO ALLOW PERSONS NOT ON THE HUD AGREEMENT TO REMAIN ON PREMISES - DEFS. WARRANT THERE ARE NO OTHER ADULTS W/RIGHT OF POSSESSION - ALL PMTS ARE TO BE BY CASHIERS CHECK OR MONEY ORDER - IF ALL TERMS ARE MET PL. WILL DISM. UPON ANY FAILURE OF TERMS, PL. BY EXPARTE APPL MAY OBTAIN JUDGMENT & WRIT. PL. ATTY. TO PREPARE DOCUMENTS.
TRIAL OFF CALENDAR
